title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
